nodes.label: amend.webp — Dragit UI screenshot showing staged files panel and commit amend workflow
nodes.author: Alejandro De Cicco
nodes.description: Screenshot of the Dragit git GUI application. Shows a dark-themed window titled 'Dragit' with a macOS-style traffic-light titlebar. The main panel displays '8 staged files • 3 not staged files' with a hand cursor hovering over the staged files count. Two action buttons are visible: 'Stage all' and 'Commit'. Below, a commit entry shows 'A commit with a message' authored by 'Alejandro De Cicco, 1 minute ago' with hash '#6e2a5e38'. A vertical git graph line with a red/pink highlighted branch line appears on the left. The screenshot illustrates the amend commit workflow — selecting a prior commit for amendment while new staged changes are present.
